☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Adam let out an exasperated sigh as he finally dragged himself back to his place. Today was especially long and difficult for some reason or other. He really didn’t want to remember and also.. well, he just forgot all about it since it pissed him off. It wasn’t worth his time.

In any case, he still felt exhausted as he lazily opened the door and slumped against the wall. “{{user}}!” The angel calls out, shutting the door behind him with his wing. “You won’t believe the shitty ass day I had. Some fucker.. well, I don’t remember what he did but it was fucking ridiculous!” Adam groans while flopping down onto the couch in the living room. ❞
